headline: Digital Transformation, Automation, Retail Media Screen Networks, D/OOH
summary: Experienced Chief Commercial Officer with a demonstrated history of working in the D/OOH advertising industry. Strong professional skills covering OOH Technology, Software for D/OOH, Software Architecture for D/OOH, Digital transformation, Digital Strategy, Media Sales, Advertising, Media Buying.

experiences.title: Santa's little helper.
experiences.description: Working for a British Ski Company who specialise in organising bespoke holidays to Serre Chevalier in the Hautes-Alpes, France.

experiences.title: Account Director
experiences.description: Welcome to ECNlive, the digital display network connecting brands with executive audiences in the corporate environment. Our rapidly expanding display network delivers a real-time mixt of live news, relevant content and full-motion display advertising to executives working in more than one hundred of London’s most prominent corporate buildings. From SME’s to PLCs, ECNlive connects brands with hundreds of thousands of business people working for some of Britain’s most dynamic companies in diverse sectors ranging from technology to finance, fashion and media. We enable brands to maximize the potential of digital display media, blending real-time updated content with the flexibility of day-part campaigns, capturing business audiences in high-dwell time corporate locations. Specialties Advertising, Office Communication, News, finance, lifestyle, Digital Media

experiences.title: Head of Trading
experiences.description: Group Head - promoted to Head of Trading July 2009

accomplishment_projects.title: Signkick Trading Bridge
accomplishment_projects.description: We’re on a mission to simplify the planning, purchase and execution of OOH for media owners. Designed to work separately or together, our modular, cloud-based software has the flexibility to tackle multiple tasks and integrate seamlessly into systems you already use.

recommendations:
Andy Kelly

I have being doing business with Andy for some years now, and he has never been anything but professional.  The things that set him apart though, are his integrity, product knowledge, and a desire to get the best results for the client.

I hope to do business with Andy for many years to come.
